stemHtml:
You are flying a VFR flight by dead reckoning. Flying from point B to point C, you make a position fix. The aircraft is 4 NM off track after 40 NM of flight. Using the 1:60 rule, determine the heading to fly parallel to the intended track, using the given information.

Planned DR heading from B to C: 313°(T)
Cross track error: 4 NM left
Along track distance from B: 40 NM
